author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas CORE Update

 We're adding MORE to your Star Atlas CORE!

CORE now comes with more extras!

  FIRST extra:
 The Collector’s Edition: 2 extra editions for collecting a full set of CORE episodes, a total of 3 hardcover books: CORE : Graphic Novel, CORE : The Covers, & CORE : Art Book.

   SECOND extra:
You can now obtain a hardcover of any single Act by collecting 6 different episode covers of that Act. You need a cover from every Act episode

The choice is yours! Use your cover collection for getting the Collector’s Edition of 3 hardcover books (the full graphic novel, the covers and the art book) OR will you use the covers to obtain new Exclusive Hardcovers of different Acts? 

Now is your last chance to get all collectible covers of Act 2 - Episode 1!  Sale ends Friday, August 11 at 1:00PM ET.

 | Star Atlas cover - https://play.staratlas.com/market/GkyznBSPCKRsi8qSBXjAYvhzAUzhdRGMe3LvNyczdixL/
 | Magic Eden cover - https://magiceden.io/sft/DCQSKEJ2REngJQ8BDVBaqg6K74AVpP1vGCRoejH4uKFa?name=Core-Act-2---Episode-1-(ME)
